items.title: The One Cache That Broke Our Treasure Hunt Engine
items.description:
The Problem We Were Actually Solving

Our core game loop was:

player scans QR → API writes record → Geo-indexer updates spatial index → leaderboard recalculates.

items.title: Why your AI chat reconnects but your session doesn't
items.description: TL;DR: WebSockets are the right protocol for production AI chat. But the connection is stateless at the session level. items.description:

items.description: If you run a public API without rate limiting, it's only a matter of time before a runaway client, a misconfigured retry loop, or a well-intentioned load test brings your service to its knees. .NET 7 shipped a first-class rate-limiting API — no third-party middleware required.
